detailed_description: The video documents a volatile incident at a McDonald's establishment in Michigan, US. An agitated customer, seen at the counter, suddenly lashes out by throwing a cup of scalding hot coffee directly at a surprised worker. This aggressive act, captured in real-time, highlights a moment of extreme negative emotion and conflict. The quick interaction shows the customer initiating the throw and immediately turning to leave after the liquid splashes. This footage serves as a stark example of an unfortunate customer-employee confrontation.

segments.why_kept: This segment precisely captures the core action of the video: the customer throwing coffee at the worker. It represents the emotional climax and the central 'problem state' that the video intends to convey, demonstrating the aggressive interaction clearly and concisely.
